task_completion.description: Verify that the sales_data.csv file has been loaded into Power BI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data' or 'Fields' pane on the right side of the Power BI interface displays the 'sales_data' table with columns such as 'Sales_Amount' and 'Sale_Date'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Running_Total' DAX measure has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field named 'Running_Total' with a calculator icon appears in the Data/Fields pane, or the DAX formula bar is visible showing the calculation for 'Running_Total'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Line Chart for Sales_Amount by Sale_Date (Month granularity) is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report canvas contains a Line Chart visual. The X-axis should display months, and the Y-axis should represent the Sales_Amount.

task_completion.description: Verify that both a Trend Line and a Forecast are enabled on the Line Chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Line Chart displays a straight trend line overlaid on the data, AND a forecast section extending beyond the historical data (typically shown as a line with a shaded confidence interval area).

task_completion.description: Verify that an Area Chart for Running_Total by Sale_Date (Month granularity) is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report canvas contains an Area Chart visual. The X-axis should display months, and the Y-axis should represent the Running_Total (the plotted area should show a strictly non-decreasing cumulative trend).

task_completion.description: Verify that the report is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI Desktop application title bar reads 'Monthly_Trend_Forecast - Power BI Desktop', or a file explorer window shows 'Monthly_Trend_Forecast.pbix' saved on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Power BI Desktop application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the authentic Power BI Desktop GUI (ribbon, canvas, visualizations pane, data pane) rather than a text editor, script, or alternative software.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the GUI to build the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Trajectories show the agent clicking through menus, dragging fields into the Visualizations pane, and using the Analytics pane, rather than just executing a terminal command to generate the file.

integrity.description: Verify the visuals are genuinely rendered by Power BI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The charts exhibit standard Power BI formatting, tooltips, and interactive elements, and do not appear to be static images pasted onto the canvas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is a Power BI report named 'Monthly_Trend_Forecast.pbix' using 'sales_data.csv'. The report must contain a DAX measure named 'Running_Total' that calculates the cumulative sum of Sales_Amount. The canvas must include two specific visuals: 1) A Line Chart of Sales_Amount by Sale_Date (Month granularity) that has both a Trend Line and a Forecast enabled via the Power BI Analytics pane. 2) An Area Chart showing the Running_Total measure by Sale_Date (Month granularity).
